t_id.kemenag: laknya adalah kesturi; dan untuk yang demikian itu hendaknya orang berlomba-lomba.
t_id.sabiq: Kepada mereka disuguhkan minuman murni yang tersimpan. Semakin lama disimpan, minuman itu semakin bertambah lezat aromanya. Hendaknya manusia saling berlomba untuk mendapatkan kesenangan seperti itu.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Laknya adalah kesturi) setelah diminum keluar daripadanya bau minyak kesturi (dan untuk meraih yang demikian itu hendaknya orang berlomba-lomba) artinya hendaklah mereka menginginkannya dengan cara bersegera taat kepada Allah swt.
t_id.iwq: laknya adalah kesturi; dan untuk yang demikian itu hendaknya orang berlomba-lomba.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ختامه مسك» أي آخر شربه تفوح من رائحة المسك «وفي ذلك فليتنافس المتنافسون» فليرغبوا بالمبادرة إلى طاعة الله
tafsir.siraj-ar: خِتَٰمُهُۥ مِسۡكٞۚ وَفِي ذَٰلِكَ فَلۡيَتَنَافَسِ ٱلۡمُتَنَٰفِسُونَ (خِتَامُهُ مِسْكٌ: آخِرُهُ رَائِحَةُ المِسْكِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Laknya adalah kesturi) setelah diminum keluar daripadanya bau minyak kesturi (dan untuk meraih yang demikian itu hendaknya orang berlomba-lomba) artinya hendaklah mereka menginginkannya dengan cara bersegera taat kepada Allah swt

t.sahih-int: And its mixture is of Tasneem
t.asad: for it is composed of all that is most exalting
t.yusuf-ali: With it will be (given) a mixture of Tasnim
t.pickthall: And mixed with water of Tasnim
t.arberry: and whose mixture is Tasnim
t.hilali-khan: It (that wine) will be mixed with Tasnim
t.itani: Its mixture is of Tasneem.
t.mubarakpuri: It will be mixed with Tasnim:
t.qarib: It is mixed with the water from Tasneem
t.wahiduddin: a wine tempered with the waters of Tasnim
t.shakir: And the admixture of it is a water of Tasnim
t.haleem: mixed with the water of Tasnim
t.maariful: and it will be blended with (a drink from) Tasnīm
t.khattab: And this drink’s flavour will come from Tasnîm—
t.ghali: And whose blend is of Tasnim
t.irving: It will be blended with a beverage
t.iwq: And its mixture is of Tasneem

t_id.kemenag: Dan campuran khamar murni itu adalah dari tasnim,
t_id.sabiq: Campuran khamar murni itu bersal dari air tasnîm di dalam surga, sebuah sumber air yang hanya boleh diminum oleh penghuni surga yang didekatkan kepada Allah.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan campuran khamar murni itu) yaitu barang yang dicampurkan ke dalamnya (adalah tasnim) makna tasnim ditafsirkan atau dijelaskan oleh firman berikutnya:
t_id.iwq: Dan campuran khamar murni itu adalah dari tasnim,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ومزاجه» أي ما يمزج به «من تسنيم» فُسر بقوله
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَمِزَاجُهُۥ مِن تَسۡنِيمٍ (وَمِزَاجُهُ: خَلْطُهُ, تَسْنِيمٍ: عَيْنٍ فيِ أَعْلَى الجَنَّةِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan campuran khamar murni itu) yaitu barang yang dicampurkan ke dalamnya (adalah tasnim) makna tasnim ditafsirkan atau dijelaskan oleh firman berikutnya

t.sahih-int: A spring from which those near [to Allah] drink
t.asad: a source [of bliss] whereof those who are drawn close unto God shall drink
t.yusuf-ali: A spring, from (the waters) whereof drink those Nearest to Allah
t.pickthall: A spring whence those brought near (to Allah) drink
t.arberry: a fountain at which do drink those brought nigh
t.hilali-khan: A spring whereof drink those nearest to Allah
t.itani: A spring from which those brought near drink.
t.mubarakpuri: A spring whereof drink those nearest to Allah.
t.qarib: a spring from which those near [to God] drink
t.wahiduddin: a spring at which those drawn close to God will drink
t.shakir: A fountain from which drink they who are drawn near (to Allah)
t.haleem: a spring from which those brought near will drink
t.maariful: a spring from which will drink those who are blessed with nearness
t.khattab: a spring from which those nearest ˹to Allah˺ will drink
t.ghali: A spring at which drink the near-stationed (i.e., the Angles stationed near Allah)
t.irving: from a spring where those close [to God] will drink
t.iwq: A spring from which those near to Allah drink

t_id.kemenag: (yaitu) mata air yang minum daripadanya orang-orang yang didekatkan kepada Allah.
t_id.sabiq: Campuran khamar murni itu bersal dari air tasnîm di dalam surga, sebuah sumber air yang hanya boleh diminum oleh penghuni surga yang didekatkan kepada Allah.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Yaitu mata air) dinashabkan oleh lafal Amdaha yang tidak disebutkan (yang minum daripadanya orang-orang yang didekatkan kepada Allah) atau makna lafal Yasyrabu ini mengandung pengertian Yaltadzdzu; artinya yang minum dengan lezatnya adalah orang-orang yang didekatkan kepada Allah dari mata air itu.
t_id.iwq: (yaitu) mata air yang minum daripadanya orang-orang yang didekatkan kepada Allah.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «عينا» فنصبه بأمدح مقدرا «يشرب بها المقربون» منها، أو ضمن يشرب معنى يلتذ
tafsir.siraj-ar: عَيۡنٗا يَشۡرَبُ بِهَا ٱلۡمُقَرَّبُونَ (يَشْرَبُ بِهَا: يَشْرَبُونَ مُتَلَذِّذِينَ بِهَا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Yaitu mata air) dinashabkan oleh lafal Amdaha yang tidak disebutkan (yang minum daripadanya orang-orang yang didekatkan kepada Allah) atau makna lafal Yasyrabu ini mengandung pengertian Yaltadzdzu; artinya yang minum dengan lezatnya adalah orang-orang yang didekatkan kepada Allah dari mata air itu

ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِینَ أَجۡرَمُوا۟ كَانُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلَّذِینَ ءَامَنُوا۟ یَضۡحَكُونَ
ar_simple: إن ٱلذین أجرموا كانوا من ٱلذین ءامنوا یضحكون

t.sahih-int: Indeed, those who committed crimes used to laugh at those who believed
t.asad: BEHOLD, those who have abandoned themselves to sin are wont to laugh at such as have attained to faith
t.yusuf-ali: Those in sin used to laugh at those who believed
t.pickthall: Lo! the guilty used to laugh at those who believed
t.arberry: Behold, the sinners were laughing at the believers
t.hilali-khan: Verily! (During the worldly life) those who committed crimes used to laugh at those who believed
t.itani: Those who committed crimes used to laugh at those who believed.
t.mubarakpuri: Verily, those who committed crimes used to laugh at those who believed.
t.qarib: Those who rejected the faith and severed their relation with God used to laugh at those who believed
t.wahiduddin: The wicked used to laugh at the believers
t.shakir: Surely they who are guilty used to laugh at those who believe
t.haleem: The wicked used to laugh at the believers––
t.maariful: Indeed those who were guilty used to laugh at those who believed
t.khattab: Indeed, the wicked used to laugh at the believers
t.ghali: Surely the ones who are (guilty of) crimes used to laugh at the ones who believed
t.irving: Those who commit crimes used to laugh at those who believe
t.iwq: Indeed, those who committed crimes used to laugh at those who believed

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang berdosa, adalah mereka yang menertawakan orang-orang yang beriman.
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya orang yang melakukan kejahatan-kejahatan menyangkut agama, dengan nada mengejek, mereka selalu mentertawakan orang-orang yang beriman di dunia.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang berdosa) seperti Abu Jahal dan lain-lainnya (adalah mereka terhadap orang-orang yang beriman) seperti Ammar bin Yasir, Bilal bin Rabbah dan lain-lainnya (mereka selalu menertawakannya) dan memperolok-olokkannya.
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang berdosa, adalah mereka yang menertawakan orang-orang yang beriman.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إن الذين أجرموا» كأبي جهل ونحوه «كانوا من الذين آمنوا» كعمار وبلال ونحوهما «يضحكون» استهزاءً بهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ أَجۡرَمُواْ كَانُواْ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ يَضۡحَكُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang berdosa) seperti Abu Jahal dan lain-lainnya (adalah mereka terhadap orang-orang yang beriman) seperti Ammar bin Yasir, Bilal bin Rabbah dan lain-lainnya (mereka selalu menertawakannya) dan memperolok-olokkannya

t.sahih-int: And when they passed by them, they would exchange derisive glances
t.asad: and whenever they pass by them, they wink at one another [derisively]
t.yusuf-ali: And whenever they passed by them, used to wink at each other (in mockery)
t.pickthall: And wink one to another when they passed them
t.arberry: when them passed them by winking at one another
t.hilali-khan: And whenever they passed by them, used to wink one to another (in mockery)
t.itani: And when they passed by them, they would wink at one another.
t.mubarakpuri: And, whenever they passed by them, used to wink one to another.
t.qarib: They would wink at one another when the believers passed by them
t.wahiduddin: when they passed by them, they would wink at one another
t.shakir: And when they passed by them, they winked at one another
t.haleem: they would wink at one another when the believers passed by them
t.maariful: and when they passed by them, they used to wink at one another
t.khattab: wink to one another whenever they passed by
t.ghali: And when they passed by them (they used) to wink one to another
t.irving: Whenever they pass by them, they nod to one another
t.iwq: And when they passed by them, they would exchange derisive glances

t_id.kemenag: Dan apabila orang-orang yang beriman lalu di hadapan mereka, mereka saling mengedip-ngedipkan matanya.
t_id.sabiq: Ketika orang-orang yang beriman berlalu di hadapan orang-orang yang mengejek itu, mereka saling menggunjing sebagai bentuk ejekan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan apabila mereka berlalu) yakni orang-orang yang beriman itu (di hadapan orang-orang yang berdosa, maka orang-orang yang berdosa itu saling mengedipkan matanya) di antara sesama mereka mengisyaratkan dengan kedipan dan picingan alis mereka kepada orang-orang mukmin yang lewat di hadapan mereka. Isyarat ini untuk memperolok-olokkan mereka yang lewat itu.
t_id.iwq: Dan apabila orang-orang yang beriman lalu di hadapan mereka, mereka saling mengedip-ngedipkan matanya.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وإذا مروا» أي المؤمنون «بهم يتغامزون» يشير المجرمون إلى المؤمنين بالجفن والحاجب استهزاء
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَإِذَا مَرُّواْ بِهِمۡ يَتَغَامَزُونَ (يَتَغَامَزُونَ: يَغْمِزُ بَعْضُهُمْ بَعْضًا بِأَعْيُنِهِمُ اسْتِهْزَاءً)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan apabila mereka berlalu) yakni orang-orang yang beriman itu (di hadapan orang-orang yang berdosa, maka orang-orang yang berdosa itu saling mengedipkan matanya) di antara sesama mereka mengisyaratkan dengan kedipan dan picingan alis mereka kepada orang-orang mukmin yang lewat di hadapan mereka. Isyarat ini untuk memperolok-olokkan mereka yang lewat itu

ar: وَإِذَا ٱنقَلَبُوۤا۟ إِلَىٰۤ أَهۡلِهِمُ ٱنقَلَبُوا۟ فَكِهِینَ
ar_simple: وإذا ٱنقلبوا إلى أهلهم ٱنقلبوا فكهین

t.sahih-int: And when they returned to their people, they would return jesting
t.asad: and whenever they return to people of their own kind, they return full of jests
t.yusuf-ali: And when they returned to their own people, they would return jesting
t.pickthall: And when they returned to their own folk, they returned jesting
t.arberry: and when they returned to their people they returned blithely
t.hilali-khan: And when they returned to their own people, they would return jesting
t.itani: And when they went back to their families, they would go back exulting.
t.mubarakpuri: And when they returned to their own people, they would return jesting;
t.qarib: joking about them when they returned to their people
t.wahiduddin: and when they returned to their own people, they would speak of them jestingly
t.shakir: And when they returned to their own followers they returned exulting
t.haleem: joke about them when they got back to their own people
t.maariful: and when they went back to their family, they went enjoying their mockery
t.khattab: and muse ˹over these exploits˺ upon returning to their own people
t.ghali: And when they turned over (to their families), they turned over jesting
t.irving: Then when they go back to their own people, they return exultant
t.iwq: And when they returned to their people, they would return jesting

t_id.kemenag: Dan apabila orang-orang yang berdosa itu kembali kepada kaumnya, mereka kembali dengan gembira.
t_id.sabiq: Dan mereka merasa sangat puas dengan tindakan itu, ketika kembali kepada kelompok mereka.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan apabila orang-orang yang berdosa itu kembali) pulang (kepada kaumnya, mereka kembali dengan gembira) menurut suatu qiraat dibaca Faakihiina bukan Fakihiina; artinya mereka merasa puas karena telah memperolok-olokkan kaum mukmin.
t_id.iwq: Dan apabila orang-orang yang berdosa itu kembali kepada kaumnya, mereka kembali dengan gembira.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وإذا انقلبوا» رجعوا «إلى أهلهم انقلبوا فاكهين» وفي قراءة فكهين معجبين بذكرهم المؤمنين
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَإِذَا ٱنقَلَبُوٓاْ إِلَىٰٓ أَهۡلِهِمُ ٱنقَلَبُواْ فَكِهِينَ (انقَلَبُوا: رَجَعُوا, فَكِهِينَ: مُتَلَذِّذِينَ بِسُخْرِيَتِهِمْ مِنَ المَؤْمِنِينَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan apabila orang-orang yang berdosa itu kembali) pulang (kepada kaumnya, mereka kembali dengan gembira) menurut suatu qiraat dibaca Faakihiina bukan Fakihiina; artinya mereka merasa puas karena telah memperolok-olokkan kaum mukmin

ar: وَإِذَا رَأَوۡهُمۡ قَالُوۤا۟ إِنَّ هَـٰۤؤُلَاۤءِ لَضَاۤلُّونَ
ar_simple: وإذا رأوهم قالوا إن هؤلاء لضالون

t.sahih-int: And when they saw them, they would say, "Indeed, those are truly lost
t.asad: and whenever they see those [who believe,] they say, "Behold, these [people] have indeed gone astray
t.yusuf-ali: And whenever they saw them, they would say, "Behold! These are the people truly astray
t.pickthall: And when they saw them they said: Lo! these have gone astray
t.arberry: and when they saw them they said, 'Lo, these men are astray
t.hilali-khan: And when they saw them, they said: "Verily! These have indeed gone astray
t.itani: And if they saw them, they would say, “These people are lost.”
t.mubarakpuri: And when they saw them, they said: "Verily, these have indeed gone astray!"
t.qarib: And if they saw them, they would say, "Indeed, those are truly lost
t.wahiduddin: and when they saw them, they said [scornfully], "These men have surely gone astray
t.shakir: And when they saw them, they said: Most surely these are in error
t.haleem: and say, when they saw them, ‘These people are misguided,’
t.maariful: and when they saw them, they said, “Surely these are the ones who have gone astray”
t.khattab: And when they saw the faithful, they would say, “These ˹people˺ are truly astray,”
t.ghali: And when they saw them, they said, "Surely these (people) are indeed erring
t.irving: Whenever they see them, they say: "Those (men) are far astray
t.iwq: And when they saw them, they would say, "Indeed, those are truly lost

t_id.kemenag: Dan apabila mereka melihat orang-orang mukmin, mereka mengatakan: "Sesungguhnya mereka itu benar-benar orang-orang yang sesat",
t_id.sabiq: Apabila melihat orang-orang beriman, meraka berkata, "Mereka adalah orang-orang tersesat karena mau percaya kepada Muhammad." Padahal tidak ada yang memerintah orang-orang yang mengejek itu untuk memberikan penilaian terhadap orang lain: apakah dia tertunjuki atau tersesat, juga bukan untuk menjadi pengawas bagi perbuatan orang lain.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan apabila mereka melihatnya) yakni melihat orang-orang yang beriman (mereka mengatakan, "Sesungguhnya mereka itu benar-benar orang-orang yang sesat") karena mereka telah beriman kepada Muhammad.
t_id.iwq: Dan apabila mereka melihat orang-orang mukmin, mereka mengatakan: "Sesungguhnya mereka itu benar-benar orang-orang yang sesat",

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وإذا رأوْهم» أي المؤمنين «قالوا إن هؤلاء لضالون» لإيمانهم بمحمد صلى الله عليه وسلم
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَإِذَا رَأَوۡهُمۡ قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ لَضَآلُّونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan apabila mereka melihatnya) yakni melihat orang-orang yang beriman (mereka mengatakan, "Sesungguhnya mereka itu benar-benar orang-orang yang sesat") karena mereka telah beriman kepada Muhammad

t.sahih-int: But they had not been sent as guardians over them
t.asad: And, withal, they have no call to watch over [the beliefs of] others
t.yusuf-ali: But they had not been sent as keepers over them
t.pickthall: Yet they were not sent as guardians over them
t.arberry: Yet they were not sent as watchers over them
t.hilali-khan: But they (disbelievers, sinners) had not been sent as watchers over them (the believers)
t.itani: Yet they were not sent as guardians over them.
t.mubarakpuri: But they were not sent as watchers over them.
t.qarib: Yet, they were not sent as guardians over them
t.wahiduddin: though they were not sent to be their keepers
t.shakir: And they were not sent to be keepers over them
t.haleem: though they were not sent to be their keepers
t.maariful: while they were not sent as watchmen over them
t.khattab: even though they were not sent as keepers over the believers
t.ghali: And in no way were they sent preservers over them
t.irving: They have not been sent as overseers (to be) set up over them
t.iwq: But they had not been sent as guardians over them

t_id.kemenag: padahal orang-orang yang berdosa itu tidak dikirim untuk penjaga bagi orang-orang mukmin.
t_id.sabiq: Apabila melihat orang-orang beriman, meraka berkata, "Mereka adalah orang-orang tersesat karena mau percaya kepada Muhammad." Padahal tidak ada yang memerintah orang-orang yang mengejek itu untuk memberikan penilaian terhadap orang lain: apakah dia tertunjuki atau tersesat, juga bukan untuk menjadi pengawas bagi perbuatan orang lain.
t_id.jalalayn-id: Allah swt. berfirman (padahal orang-orang yang berdosa itu tidak dikirim) maksudnya orang-orang kafir itu tidak disuruh (kepada orang-orang yang beriman) atau kaum mukmin (sebagai penjaga) bagi mereka, atau bagi amal perbuatan mereka, sehingga berhak untuk membenarkan mereka.
t_id.iwq: padahal orang-orang yang berdosa itu tidak dikirim untuk penjaga bagi orang-orang mukmin.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: قال تعالى: «وما أرسلوا» أي الكفار «عليهم» على المؤمنين «حافظين» لهم أو لأعمالهم حتى يدروهم إلى مصالحهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَمَآ أُرۡسِلُواْ عَلَيۡهِمۡ حَٰفِظِينَ (حَافِظِينَ: رُقَبَاءَ يُحْصُونَ أَعْمَالَهُمْ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Allah swt. berfirman (padahal orang-orang yang berdosa itu tidak dikirim) maksudnya orang-orang kafir itu tidak disuruh (kepada orang-orang yang beriman) atau kaum mukmin (sebagai penjaga) bagi mereka, atau bagi amal perbuatan mereka, sehingga berhak untuk membenarkan mereka

ar: فَٱلۡیَوۡمَ ٱلَّذِینَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلۡكُفَّارِ یَضۡحَكُونَ
ar_simple: فٱلیوم ٱلذین ءامنوا من ٱلكفار یضحكون

t.sahih-int: So Today those who believed are laughing at the disbelievers
t.asad: But on the Day [of Judgment], they who had attained to faith will [be able to] laugh at the [erstwhile] deniers of the truth
t.yusuf-ali: But on this Day the Believers will laugh at the Unbelievers
t.pickthall: This day it is those who believe who have the laugh of disbelievers
t.arberry: So today the believers are laughing at the unbelievers
t.hilali-khan: But this Day (the Day of Resurrection) those who believe will laugh at the disbelievers
t.itani: But on that Day, those who believed will laugh at the unbelievers.
t.mubarakpuri: But this Day those who believe will laugh at the disbelievers
t.qarib: So today those who believed will laugh at the unbelievers
t.wahiduddin: so today those who believe shall [be able to] laugh at those who denied the truth
t.shakir: So today those who believe shall laugh at the unbelievers
t.haleem: so today the believers are laughing at the disbelievers
t.maariful: So, today those who believed will laugh at the disbelievers
t.khattab: But on that Day the believers will be laughing at the disbelievers
t.ghali: So Today the ones who believed are laughing at the steadfast disbelievers
t.irving: so today those who believe will laugh at disbelievers
t.iwq: Thus Today those who believed are laughing at the disbelievers

t_id.kemenag: Maka pada hari ini, orang-orang yang beriman menertawakan orang-orang kafir,
t_id.sabiq: Kelak, di hari pembalasan, orang-orang Mukmin akan berbalik menertawakan orang-orang kafir sebagai balasan atas tidakan serupa yang mereka lakukan terhadap orang-orang Mukmin.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka pada hari ini) yakni hari kiamat (orang-orang yang beriman menertawakan orang-orang kafir.)
t_id.iwq: Maka pada hari ini, orang-orang yang beriman menertawakan orang-orang kafir,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فاليوم» أي يوم القيامة «الذين آمنوا من الكفار يضحكون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَٱلۡيَوۡمَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ مِنَ ٱلۡكُفَّارِ يَضۡحَكُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka pada hari ini) yakni hari kiamat (orang-orang yang beriman menertawakan orang-orang kafir)

t.sahih-int: On adorned couches, observing
t.asad: [for, resting in paradise] on couches, they will look on [and say to themselves]
t.yusuf-ali: On Thrones (of Dignity) they will command (a sight) (of all things)
t.pickthall: On high couches, gazing
t.arberry: upon couches gazing
t.hilali-khan: On (high) thrones, looking (at all things)
t.itani: On luxurious furnishings, looking on.
t.mubarakpuri: On thrones, looking.
t.qarib: while seated on luxurious furnishings, looking around
t.wahiduddin: as they sit on couches, gazing around
t.shakir: On thrones, they will look
t.haleem: as they sit on couches, gazing around
t.maariful: While (sitting) on thrones, they will be seeing
t.khattab: as they sit on ˹canopied˺ couches, looking on
t.ghali: On couches, looking (down upon them)
t.irving: from couches where they [lie] watching
t.iwq: On adorned couches, observing

t_id.kemenag: mereka (duduk) di atas dipan-dipan sambil memandang.
t_id.sabiq: Di atas dipan dan persandaran, orang-orang beriman akan menyaksikan berbagai kenikmatan yang diberikan Allah kepada mereka.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Mereka duduk di atas dipan-dipan) di surga (sambil memandang) dari tempat tinggal mereka kepada orang-orang kafir yang sedang diazab; maka orang-orang yang beriman itu menertawakan mereka sebagaimana mereka menertawakannya ketika mereka berada di dunia.
t_id.iwq: mereka (duduk) di atas dipan-dipan sambil memandang.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «على الأرائك» في الجنة «ينظرون» من منازلهم إلى الكفار وهم يعذبون فيضحكون منهم كما ضحك الكفار منهم في الدنيا
tafsir.siraj-ar: عَلَى ٱلۡأَرَآئِكِ يَنظُرُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Mereka duduk di atas dipan-dipan) di surga (sambil memandang) dari tempat tinggal mereka kepada orang-orang kafir yang sedang diazab; maka orang-orang yang beriman itu menertawakan mereka sebagaimana mereka menertawakannya ketika mereka berada di dunia

ar: هَلۡ ثُوِّبَ ٱلۡكُفَّارُ مَا كَانُوا۟ یَفۡعَلُونَ
ar_simple: هل ثوب ٱلكفار ما كانوا یفعلون

t.sahih-int: Have the disbelievers [not] been rewarded [this Day] for what they used to do
t.asad: Are these deniers of the truth being [thus] requited for [aught but] what they were wont to do
t.yusuf-ali: Will not the Unbelievers have been paid back for what they did
t.pickthall: Are not the disbelievers paid for what they used to do
t.arberry: Have the unbelievers been rewarded what they were doing
t.hilali-khan: Are not the disbelievers paid (fully) for what they used to do
t.itani: Have the unbelievers been repaid for what they used to do?
t.mubarakpuri: Are not the disbelievers paid for what they used to do
t.qarib: Have the unbelievers been rewarded for their deeds
t.wahiduddin: Have those who deny the truth [not] been paid back for their deeds
t.shakir: Surely the disbelievers are rewarded as they did
t.haleem: Have the disbelievers [not] been repaid for their deeds
t.maariful: whether the disbelievers have been paid back for what they used to do
t.khattab: ˹The believers will be asked,˺ “Have the disbelievers ˹not˺ been paid back for what they used to do?”
t.ghali: Have the steadfast disbelievers been requited for what they were performing
t.irving: Are not disbelievers being compensated for just what they have been doing
t.iwq: Have the disbelievers not been rewarded this Day for what they used to do

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya orang-orang kafir telah diberi ganjaran terhadap apa yang dahulu mereka kerjakan.
t_id.sabiq: Apakah orang-orang kafir juga akan diberi balasan atas perbuatan mereka di dunia?
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Apakah telah diberi ganjaran) atau telah diberi pembalasan (orang-orang kafir itu sesuai dengan apa yang dahulu mereka kerjakan?) jawabnya, "Ya", atau, "Tentu saja."
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya orang-orang kafir telah diberi ganjaran terhadap apa yang dahulu mereka kerjakan.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «هل ثُوِّبَ» جوزي «الكفار ما كانوا يفعلون» نعم
tafsir.siraj-ar: هَلۡ ثُوِّبَ ٱلۡكُفَّارُ مَا كَانُواْ يَفۡعَلُونَ (ثُوِّبَ: جُوزِيَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Apakah telah diberi ganjaran) atau telah diberi pembalasan (orang-orang kafir itu sesuai dengan apa yang dahulu mereka kerjakan?) jawabnya, "Ya", atau, "Tentu saja
